blended.narrative: Lutsen Mountains is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,555 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
